headline: How The Investment Story For J.B. Hunt (JBHT) Is Shifting With Conflicting Analyst Signals
summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services is back in focus as analysts recalibrate price targets, with model fair value holding at US$211.17 in line with updated target references clustered around the US$200 to US$245 range. That range reflects a split view, where some analysts see room tied to a freight recovery and infrastructure spending, while others warn the recent transport rally may already bake in a lot of good news. Coming up, you will see how to track these shifting targets and what they might...
